item.label: Final Validation and Cleanup
item.summary: Validate migration and clean up old files

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# Final Validation and Cleanup

## Purpose

Validate migration and clean up old files.

## Scope

- Run validation
- Verify references
- Backup and remove old files

## Implementation

1. Run validation
2. Verify references
3. Backup and remove

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Validation passes
2. References verified
3. Old files removed
